title: Infosys and Cursor Announce Strategic Collaboration for AI-Assisted Software Engineering
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with Cursor to accelerate enterprise adoption of AI-assisted software engineering. The companies will establish a Center of Excellence to support greenfield and brownfield engineering of complex enterprise systems and enable Infosys software engineers to use Cursor's enterprise-grade AI-assisted development capabilities. Infosys will integrate Cursor with Infosys Topaz Fabric to help clients build, modernize, and scale enterprise systems with higher velocity and quality. The CoE will also scale Cursor's AI software development capabilities across Infosys' global developer workforce, including enabling over 100,000 Infosys software engineers with agentic coding platforms.
